code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test26-JAN-2024Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, significant proteinuria, glucosuria, low urine specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal). These findings suggest impaired renal function, possibly chronic kidney disease with tubular dysfunction. No evidence of urinary tract infection is present. Further nephrological evaluation is recommended.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
